element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns stick figure controls, lateral movement, and gold pickup mechanics in early levels
Player learns guard AI patterns and predictive movement; guards do not always take shortest path
Multi-story platform navigation; guards behave erratically on ladders (sometimes repelled from player)
Alternative vertical/horizontal movement; enables digging from hanging position
Core puzzle mechanic; holes fill after delay; guards escape or respawn; player cannot escape holes
Guards can carry max one bar; dropping bars when trapped enables puzzle solutions
Coordinating avoidance and trapping; guards move alternately; pattern prediction becomes critical
Player and guards fall through; strategic element for puzzle design
Constrains digging strategy; forces alternative puzzle solutions
Advanced puzzle mechanic; requires gap width ≥ layer count, or exploiting ladder/bar positions
Complex sequences: dig guard out, move away before guard escapes, coordinate guard position for puzzle solution
Feet-to-head contact mechanics; falling guard as traversal aid; timing-critical contact

element_introduction_order.element: Guard entrapment in designed dead zones
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Luring guards into inescapable regions; requires deep understanding of AI and level architecture

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching exit at top of screen
Finding safe platform away from guards
typical_tension_triggers: Guard entering player's current screen area
Digging hole fills while player trapped below
Guard carrying last uncollected gold bar
Forced to use risky guard-as-platform mechanic
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical chase-and-pause rhythm with escalating complexity. Early levels offer exploration time; mid-game pressurizes through guard multiplication and constraint introduction; late-game demands continuous prediction and precision timing. Puzzle-solving provides mental relief breaks between chase sequences.

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to core mechanics (movement, gold, single guard) in safe, exploratory environments. One life penalty per level completion offset by +1 life reward.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mechanic density increases: multiple guards, trapdoors, bedrock constraints, digging depth requirements. Puzzle-solving demands grow; reaction time becomes secondary to spatial reasoning.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Integration of all mechanics into complex sequences. Guard AI exploitation (using as platforms, coordinated trapping/rescue), multi-layer digging, entrapment strategy. Mastery of predictive guard pathfinding essential.
notable_spikes: Introduction of 2+ simultaneous guards creating unpredictable AI interference patterns
Multi-layer digging requirements forcing spatial decomposition
Levels requiring guard-as-platform mechanic with tight timing windows
Late-stage levels combining trapdoors, bedrock, and synchronized multi-guard sequences

notable_level_patterns.description: Gold distributed across multiple vertical tiers; player must ascend ladders while guards descend. Requires sequential collection and careful guard prediction.
Level design forces guards into predictable paths where digging creates escape-proof zones. Guards drop gold when trapped; player retrieves after escape window closes.
Gold placed such that only a guard can initially reach it. Player must lure guard to location, trap them, force drop, then retrieve. Requires coordination across multiple steps.
Uses feet-to-head contact and falling guard mechanics to create traversal paths unavailable through normal platforming. Timing-critical sequences.
